monitor_system_changes: Track and monitor system changes and user actions.
confirm_delete_log: Are you sure you want to delete this log entry?
name: Name
required_placeholders_desc: These tokens must remain in the translated text exactly as shown. You can type around them but do not delete or rename them.
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
confirm_delete_role: Are you sure you want to delete this role? Users assigned to this role will be reassigned to the fallback role.
reviewer_accounts_desc: Demo credentials for Apple App Store and Google Play review processes. Reviewers skip OTP verification + rate limits + retention purge.
no_topics_configured: No topics configured. Add some in DevSettings → Topics.
no_models_with_trigger: No models use the IsNotificationTrigger trait yet.
title: Title
confirm_delete_notification_template: Are you sure you want to delete this template?
trigger_on_click_desc: Fire only when an admin clicks Send.
trigger_model_event_desc: Fire automatically when the chosen model event occurs.
safe_storage_deploy_desc: Preserve backend/storage/app/public across deploys. Backs up before wipe, restores after unzip, then re-creates the public/storage symlink. Off = stock deploy (may overwrite uploaded files).
create_app_user_desc: Create a new app user (API guard).
delete_app_user_desc: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
confirm_bulk_delete: Are you sure you want to delete the selected items? This action cannot be undone.
restore_confirmation: Are you sure you want to restore this item?
confirm_bulk_restore: Are you sure you want to restore the selected items?
force_delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this item?
force_delete_warning: This action cannot be undone. The data will be permanently removed.
confirm_force_delete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this item? This action cannot be undone.
confirm_bulk_force_delete: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the selected items? This action cannot be undone.
confirm_bulk_delete_role: Are you sure you want to delete the selected roles? Users assigned to these roles will be reassigned to the fallback role. This action cannot be undone.
drag_drop_or_click: Drag & drop or click to upload
confirm_delete_language: Are you sure you want to delete this language? All translation values for this language will be removed.
developer_settings_desc: Local development tools. Only visible when APP_ENV=local.
theme_colors_desc: Pick colors to update the CSS variables in app.css. Save then build to apply.
env_toggles_desc: Toggle .env boolean values. Changes take effect immediately.
firebase_config_desc: Upload your Firebase service account JSON for push notifications.
branding_desc: Upload your logo and favicon. Images are automatically converted to PNG.
auth_config_desc: Choose which fields users can log in with and which extra fields are available.
login_identifiers_desc: Fields users can log in with. Select one or more. All selected fields are required and unique.
additional_fields_desc: Extra profile fields available to users (not used for login).
username_login_alias_note: When enabled, username is required at register and can also be used to log in (alongside email/phone).
all_fields_are_identifiers: All fields are selected as login identifiers — no additional fields available.
login_method_desc: Choose how users sign in. Password mode keeps the classic credential flow. OTP mode removes passwords entirely — users enter their identifier, receive a one-time code, and submit it to get a token. Forgot-password disappears in OTP mode.
login_with_password_desc: Classic flow: identifier + password → token. Forgot-password and change-password endpoints active.
login_with_otp_desc: Passwordless. Identifier → OTP → token. Register collapses into login (auto-create on first hit).
github_desc: Initialize a Git repository and push to GitHub.
deploy_options_desc: Choose how to handle database during deployment.
migrate_only_desc: Run new migrations. Keeps existing data safe.
migrate_and_seed_desc: Run migrations and seeders. May add default data.
fresh_migrate_seed_desc: Drop all tables, re-migrate, and seed. ALL DATA WILL BE LOST!
skip_migrations_desc: Don't run any migrations. Use when no database changes.
fresh_warning_message: This will DELETE ALL DATA in your production database. Only use this for initial setup or when you want to completely reset the database.
production_db_desc: Configure production database credentials. Used when deploying.
base_firebase_hint: Uploaded to every deploy target. A per-target Firebase file (in Deployment) overrides this.
local_base_explainer: Local applies to your machine (.env). Base is the shared foundation (.env.production) that every deploy target inherits — override per-target in Deployment.
scope_base_hint: Inherited by all deploy targets unless a target overrides it.
mail_settings_desc: SMTP credentials for sending email. Local applies to .env; Base seeds .env.production for all deploys.
base_db_desc: The base database inherited by every deploy target. Per-flavor database overrides live in the Deployment section.
production_mail_desc: Configure production mail credentials. Used when deploying.
local_mail_desc: Mail credentials used in your local development environment.
urls_desc: Backend and frontend URLs for local and production environments.
admin_credentials_desc: Super admin login email and password. Saving locally re-seeds the admin user.
api_token_desc: X-API-TOKEN header value for mobile app API authentication.
app_name_desc: The name of your application. Synced to both local and production.
ssh_config_desc: SSH credentials for deploying to your hosting server.
domain_https_hint: https:// is added automatically — enter just the domain (e.g. example.com).
deployment_targets_desc: Configure SSH, domain and database for each environment, then pick one when deploying.
share_ssh_credentials: Same SSH credentials for all environments
share_ssh_credentials_desc: Use one SSH host/user/password for dev, staging, UAT and production. Turn off to set credentials per environment.
flavor_db_hint: Leave blank to use the base production database from .env.production.
deploy_target_hint: Pick the environment to deploy to.
flavor_override_hint: Leave any field blank to inherit the base production value from .env.production.
flavor_pusher_note: Per-flavor Pusher applies to backend broadcasting. The frontend Echo keys are baked in at build time and are shared across environments.
flavor_firebase_hint: Upload a flavor-specific Firebase service-account JSON. Used for this environment only; if none is set the base credentials are used.
flavor_inherit_explainer: The base lives in the Mail, Pusher and Firebase sections of the sidebar (saved to .env.production). Anything left blank or set to "Inherit base" here uses that base value. Fill a field only to override it for this environment.
inherit_group_hint: Uncheck to set values just for this environment.
confirm_delete_page: Are you sure you want to delete this page? This action cannot be undone.
icon_hint: Use Lucide icon name (e.g. FileText, Home, Settings)
create_page_hint: You can add content after creating the page
social_auth_config_desc: Configure Firebase social login providers and account limits for mobile app users.
allowed_providers_desc: Select which social login providers users can use to authenticate.
max_social_accounts_desc: Maximum number of social accounts a user can link. Choose 'One' to allow only one social login, or 'Unlimited' for multiple.
validation_settings_desc: Configure phone and email validation rules for API users
allowed_phone_countries_hint: Enter ISO country codes (e.g., JO,US,SA) or 'all' for any country
allowed_email_domains_hint: Enter domains (e.g., gmail.com,yahoo.com) or 'all' for any domain
verify_email_dns_desc: Check if email domain has valid MX records (DNS verification)
rate_limiting_desc: Configure request rate limits to prevent API abuse
otp_rate_limit_desc: Sending OTP codes only (send-otp, forgot-password). Verification uses the general API limit.
account_deletion_config_desc: How long to keep user-deleted accounts before permanent purge.
retention_days_desc: After this many days, accounts where the user requested deletion are permanently force-deleted.
pending_deletion_hint: User requested deletion. Auto-purges after retention. Login restores.
fcm_topics_desc: Manage Firebase topics that the app can broadcast on. Default chips (guests, users) ship out of the box; add custom topics for your own broadcast groups.
no_topics_yet: No topics yet. Add one below.
topic_name_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, dashes, and underscores only.
test_topic_broadcast_desc: Pick a topic and fire a test push. All devices subscribed to that topic on Firebase will receive it.
title: Title
sessions_settings_desc: Choose between single-session (one active token per user) and multi-session (multiple devices allowed).
multi_session_desc: Users can be logged in from multiple devices at once. The Devices API + UI is exposed so they can review and revoke sessions.
single_session_desc: Each new login revokes the user's other tokens and broadcasts a kick event so older devices clear their credentials.
pusher_settings_desc: Configure Pusher credentials for real-time broadcasting
test_broadcast_desc: Send a test broadcast to a user
dashboard_subtitle: Here's what's happening with your application today.
confirm_clear_notifications: Are you sure you want to clear all notifications? This action cannot be undone.
